meta.title: CyberVPN Mini App
meta.description: Manage your VPN subscription in Telegram

home.noSubscriptionDescription: You don't have an active subscription. Activate a trial or choose a plan to get started.
home.trialDescription: Try CyberVPN free for 3 days on 1 device.
home.vpnConfigDescription: Get your VPN config to connect from any device
home.configQRDescription: Scan this QR code with your mobile device to import the VPN configuration
home.noConfigDescription: Activate a subscription to get your VPN configuration
home.serviceMaintenanceDescription: Mini App is temporarily in maintenance mode. Some actions may be unavailable.
home.limitedRolloutDescription: Mini App is currently in limited canary rollout. Access is restricted to approved Telegram users.
home.rollbackDescription: Mini App trial and checkout are temporarily paused while rollback is in progress.
home.sessionRestoringDescription: The Mini App session is being refreshed. If the screen does not update automatically, close and reopen the Mini App from the bot.

wallet.paymentMethodPlaceholder: e.g., Crypto wallet address, PayPal email
wallet.withdrawalNote: Withdrawals require admin approval and may take 1-3 business days.
wallet.withdrawError: Withdrawal request failed. Please try again.

plans.freeTrialDescription: One device, shared pool only, no dedicated IP, no premium nodes. Clean enough to evaluate the product without breaking anti-fraud economics.
plans.trialActivated: Trial activated. You now have 3 days of entry access.
plans.trialError: Failed to activate trial. Please try again.
plans.catalogHint: Public catalog only: Basic, Plus, Pro, Max. Hidden plans stay hidden unless the backend exposes them intentionally.
plans.noPlans: No plans available at the moment
plans.currentPlanSelected: You already have this plan. Add extras or switch to another term to continue.
plans.addonsDescription: Extra devices and Dedicated IP stay separate from the main tier ladder. That keeps the catalog short and the quote logic predictable.
plans.addonsUpgradeLocked: Upgrade first, then attach add-ons. The current API treats upgrade and add-on purchase as two clean operations.
plans.extraDeviceLimit: Available up to +{count} devices on the selected plan.
plans.dedicatedIpLocationHint: Dedicated IP requires a location code. Keep it short and predictable so support and backend can match it cleanly.
plans.dedicatedIpLocationRequired: Add a location code for Dedicated IP before requesting a quote.
plans.addonUnavailable: This add-on is not available on the selected plan.
plans.checkoutCodeAcceptedReferral: Referral friend discount accepted for this checkout.
plans.inviteInvalid: Invalid or already used invite code
plans.inviteCodeNote: Invite redemption stays separate from the paid checkout flow.
plans.quoteSubtitle: The snapshot below is the source of truth for what the user will receive after purchase.
plans.quoteError: Unable to calculate a quote with the current selections.
plans.selectPlanToQuote: Choose a plan and period to calculate the quote.
plans.paymentSuccess: Payment successful. Your entitlements are now active.
plans.paymentPending: Payment was created and is awaiting confirmation.
plans.runtimeTemporarilyUnavailable: Mini App is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
plans.trialTemporarilyUnavailable: Trial activation is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
plans.checkoutTemporarilyUnavailable: Checkout is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
plans.limitedRolloutDescription: Mini App is currently in limited canary rollout. Access is restricted to approved Telegram users.
plans.rollbackDescription: Mini App trial and checkout are temporarily paused while rollback is in progress.

profile.myInvitesSubtitle: Invite codes manually issued to your account for the controlled beta.
profile.myInvitesError: Failed to load invites. Refresh the Mini App or open it again.
profile.securityNote: Manage your password and 2FA settings in the full dashboard
profile.partnerNote: Contact support for partner program information

partnerDashboard.bindCodeDescription: Enter a partner code to join the partner program and start earning commissions

profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

passwordChange.title: Change Password
passwordChange.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

antiphishing.title: Antiphishing Code
antiphishing.description: Set a unique code that will appear in all emails from us. This helps you verify that emails are genuine.
antiphishing.codeTooShort: Code must be at least 4 characters
antiphishing.codeTooLong: Code must be less than 32 characters
antiphishing.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your antiphishing code?

referral.title: Rewards Hub
referral.shareDescription: Keep referral sharing, invite and gift redemption, and issued code tracking in one place. Promo discounts still belong in checkout.
referral.qrCodeHint: Scan to open CyberVPN in Telegram with your referral code prefilled.
referral.shareText: Join CyberVPN with my referral code: {code}
referral.programUnavailable: The referral program is temporarily unavailable. Existing invites remain visible here, but new referral actions may be paused until the program is restored.
referral.redeemSubtitle: Invite and gift codes redeem here. Promo discounts and referral friend discounts apply later in checkout.
referral.redeemSuccessInvite: Invite redeemed. Added {days} free days to your account.
referral.redeemSuccessGift: Gift redeemed. Added {plan} for {days} days to your account.
referral.promoNoteBody: Promo and referral discounts stay in checkout, not in this screen. This hub only handles sharing, tracking, and invite or gift redemption.

giftPurchase.title: Buy Gift VPN
giftPurchase.subtitle: Create a gift checkout inside Telegram without mixing it into referral or promo pricing.
giftPurchase.successPaymentPending: Gift checkout created. Complete payment in Telegram.
giftPurchase.successIssued: Gift issued successfully. Share this code: {code}

errors.planRequired: Choose a plan before creating a gift checkout.

referral.invitesSubtitle: Invite codes already issued to your account.
referral.giftsSubtitle: Purchased or issued gift codes you can share from Telegram.
referral.activitySubtitle: Current backend contract still reports referral activity as reward entries tied to your account.

overview.activeInvitesHint: Unused invite codes ready to share.
overview.totalReferralsHint: Accounts attributed to your current referral program.
overview.totalRewardsHint: Current backend reward total for this account.
overview.currentRateHint: Program rate returned by the current referral contract.

notifications.title: Growth notifications
notifications.subtitle: Durable updates for invites, referral rewards, and gift codes.
notifications.empty: No growth notifications are visible right now.
notifications.detailsEmpty: Select a notification to inspect delivery details.
notifications.supportActionHint: If the automated recovery path is blocked, use the guided repair or support flow below.
notifications.noDeliveryHistory: No delivery history is attached to this notification.

preferences.title: Delivery preferences
preferences.subtitle: Choose which growth events stay in-app, email, or Telegram.
preferences.note: In-app preferences control this rewards inbox. Email and Telegram plan external delivery without creating a second source of truth.
